Hydrated Content Page

Home About Contact

Server-Rendered Article

This content was rendered on the server (SSR) and will be hydrated by React.

The main content is fully available without JavaScript execution.

Key Features

  • SEO-friendly content
  • Fast initial page load
  • Progressive enhancement
  • Accessible by default

Technical Details

This page uses React hydration to attach event handlers to pre-rendered HTML.

ReactDOM.hydrate(App, document.getElementById('root'))

Related Links

  • React Documentation
  • SSR Guide
